title: L3 cycle.error Payload
description: Emitted when cycle invocation fails before reaching cycle.complete. error_phase identifies where the failure happened: pre_check (L2 budget halt or invalid contract) or one of the 5 phases. Subsequent cron firings for the same schedule_id are unaffected (FR-L3-4). cycle-098 Sprint 3A.

error_kind.description: budget_halt: L2 verdict halt-100 or halt-uncertainty. invalid_contract: dispatch_contract YAML parse / required-field failure. phase_error: phase script exit non-zero. phase_timeout: phase script killed by timeout. phase_missing: dispatch_contract phase path does not exist or is not executable. internal: unexpected library failure.

diagnostic.description: Human-readable error description. Stderr tail when phase_error/phase_timeout. Redacted via _SECRET_PATTERNS.

phases_completed.description: Phases that ran to success before the failure. Empty when error_phase is pre_check.

outcome.description: partial: at least one phase ran to success before the error. failure: nothing succeeded (pre_check halt, or first phase failed).
